blended.narrative: Cascade Mountain is looking at a significant storm over the next 48 hours, with 17 inches of snowfall of light, fluffy snow expected. Snow levels around 45 ft. Looking ahead, 19 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 8" of snow, highs of 34°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Tomorrow: 10" of heavy snow, highs of 27°F. Expect powder.
